title: Asking a Landlord About an Apartment
description: Practice calling or meeting a landlord to ask about rent, utilities, move-in dates, and apartment features.
context: You saw a listing for a two-bedroom apartment and want to ask the landlord questions before scheduling a viewing. Be polite and clear about rent, deposit, and availability.
opening_line: Hi, thanks for your interest in the Maple Street apartment. What would you like to know?
goal_state: user has greeted the landlord and stated their interest
user has asked about rent or monthly cost
user has asked at least one question about the apartment or lease terms
user has asked about availability or a viewing
user has closed the conversation politely
success_criteria: User gathers key rental information and schedules or requests a viewing
